zero_slop_policy.statement: NO AI SLOP ALLOWED AT ALL - ZERO TOLERANCE TO SLOP AND HALLUCINATIONS
zero_slop_policy.strict_compliance: Mandatory. Every claim must be project-specific, evidence-backed, trace-linked, reviewer-challenged, and free of unsupported invention.
zero_slop_policy.missing_evidence_rule: If evidence is missing, mark it as an assumption, risk, open question, or failure.

addresses_finding: F-FN-09 (Final Hawkeye P3 — SDLC matrix snapshot reflects Stage-0 state; not refreshed for stage transitions)
supersedes_section: runs/wealth-com/02_attractor/sdlc-stage-coverage-matrix.json §stages — by amendment, not replacement; the original document is preserved for audit trail
rationale: Per Hawkeye F-FN-09: per-stage truth lives in the per-stage records (intake-validation-report, slice-ralph-sweep, ralph-loop-ARC-005, run-closure-record, etc.) but the original SDLC matrix file was authored at Stage-0 and never refreshed. This delta record amends each stage's status to match the actual run state at closure. Reading order: load original SDLC matrix → apply this delta on top.
